overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city on an overcast day. The player traverses wet sidewalks alongside a canal, crosses a busy intersection with towering skyscrapers, and examines the waterfront area with trash and advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated canal-side sidewalk with futuristic cityscape

events.description: pedestrian with bright green hair passes close to camera on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk with canal on left and traffic on right, observing the towering skyline

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright green hair and cybernetic enhancements walking toward camera
futuristic black car driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: dark water canal running parallel to the walkway with concrete edges
red safety railing separating sidewalk from the canal drop
cluster of tall buildings with holographic advertisements and neon accents
tall glass building with green neon lighting and multiple billboards
traditional Asian-inspired tower structure visible in the distance
tall modern street lamps lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet, overcast day in a futuristic city. The camera moves along an elevated sidewalk beside a canal, with red safety railings on the left and a busy multi-lane road on the right. Futuristic skyscrapers with neon accents tower in the distance, while pedestrians and vehicles move through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with neon-lit commercial towers

events.description: camera turns right to cross the wide intersection toward the neon highrise district
crossing the multi-lane road alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: turning right and crossing the street while admiring the towering neon buildings and red architectural structures

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in futuristic clothing crossing the street together

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with pink and green neon lighting and vertical gardens
large red structural archway spanning across the street ahead
yellow zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide urban intersection as the camera turns right. The character crosses yellow crosswalk lines while surrounded by other pedestrians. A massive neon-lit skyscraper dominates the right side, featuring pink and green lighting, while red structural elements frame the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal waterfront area with trash disposal and advertisement boards

events.description: approaches the canal edge and focuses on overflowing trash bins and garbage bags
camera pans right to reveal large advertisement billboards and the canal view

agents.ego_description: stopping to examine the trash accumulation by the canal then panning to view the water and cityscape

entered.detail: green metal recycling bins overflowing with garbage bags and loose trash
tied plastic bags piled next to the bins on the wet pavement
elevated walkway or bridge spanning across the canal in the distance
large vertical billboard featuring cartoon character with gun and 'CIRKOS' text
purple billboard with character in green swimwear and 'Set Sail for Flavor' text

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the canal waterfront. The camera turns to reveal overflowing trash bins and garbage bags piled on the wet pavement. Looking out over the water, industrial buildings and a futuristic bridge span the canal, while colorful advertisement billboards for 'CIRKOS' and 'Set Sail' dominate the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked futuristic city that shifts from a transit corridor to a dense urban intersection and finally to a gritty waterfront. It begins by moving along an elevated sidewalk beside a canal, flanked by red safety railings and a busy multi-lane road beneath towering neon skyscrapers. As the camera turns right, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the character crosses yellow lines amidst a crowd of pedestrians, dominated by a massive skyscraper glowing with pink and green lights. The perspective then shifts toward the canal waterfront, revealing piles of trash and overflowing bins on the wet pavement. Finally, the view expands across the water toward industrial buildings and a futuristic bridge, framed by vibrant advertisement billboards for Cirkos and Set Sail.
